I need to make changes to the app's route planning. As of now, there is a Zenit route to go on foot and a second one that offers to go with public transportation. I need the menu to offer a toggle to select the main transportation: on foot, through metro, bus or car. Also, the Zenit Route needs to be the safest (going through routes with more people and movement) and the second one may be one that is faster (consider mainly the time taken).
